fields.description: OS version of the system.

fields.description: OS end of version details of the system.

fields.name: earliestShelfEndOfSupportDate
fields.description: Earliest end-of-support date for any shelf in the system.

fields.name: earliestDiskEndOfSupportDate
fields.description: Earliest end-of-support date for any drive in the system.

fields.name: earliestEndOfSupportDate
fields.description: Earliest end of support date among hardwareModel.EndOfSupportDate, earliestShelfEndOfSupportDate and earliestDiskEndOfSupportDate.

fields.name: latestPVRDate
fields.description: Latest policy variance request date.

fields.name: latestEndOfSupportDate
fields.description: Latest date among earliestEndOfSupportDate and latestPVRDate.

fields.name: storageFirmware
fields.description: Determines the update behavior for storage firmwares, which may include critical patches, virus definitions, or other security-related enhancements.

fields.name: spbmc
fields.description: Determines the update behavior for Service Processor(SP) and Baseboard Management Controller(BMC), which may include critical patches, virus definitions, or other security-related enhancements.

fields.name: systemFile
fields.description: Determines the update behavior for system files, which may include critical patches, virus definitions, or other security-related enhancements.

fields.name: securityFile
fields.description: Determines the update behavior for security files, which may include critical patches, virus definitions, or other security-related enhancements.

fields.name: fileType
fields.description: The type of installable automatic update security file.

fields.name: fileVersion
fields.description: The version of the security file.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current status of the automatic update security file.

fields.name: priority
fields.description: The priority of the automatic update security file.

fields.name: creationDate
fields.description: Date when the automatic update security file package for a given version was created and this is used for automatic file update control

fields.name: nssCreationDate
fields.description: Date when the file package was released in NSS for customers to manually download the package and install via CLI

fields.name: systemsSummary
fields.description: Summary of system metrics that are processed for automatic security file update

fields.name: notifications
fields.description: Count of notifications that are processed for automatic security file update

fields.name: installations
fields.description: Count of installations that are processed for automatic security file update

fields.name: serialNumber
fields.description: Serial Number of the shelf.

fields.name: shelfId
fields.description: Front panel identifier of the shelf.

fields.name: devicePath
fields.description: Local device path of the shelf

fields.name: isInternal
fields.description: Identifies if the shelf is internal or external

fields.name: logicalIdentifier
fields.description: Logical identifier of the shelf

fields.name: hardwareModel
fields.description: The shelf hardware model details.

fields.name: moduleHardwareModel
fields.description: The shelf module hardware details.

fields.name: ports
fields.description: Shelf module ports with total count.

fields.name: bays
fields.description: Drive bays in the shelf enclosure, correspond to drive.slot in the Disk schema.

fields.name: drives
fields.description: Drives associated with a shelf

fields.name: groupBy
fields.description: Group devices by specified criteria

fields.name: majorOsVersion
fields.description: Specifies the major version level of the storage OS, which is typically an iterated numerical designation.

fields.name: supportState
fields.description: The state of the NetApp Storage OS support. This classifies if a particular OS version is `Recommended`, `Standard`, or `Withdrawn`.

fields.description: The OS type of the system.
